title: Western Hope posts record total
description: CRICKET NEWS - The semi-finalists for the...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The semi-finalists for the Six Gun Grill Promotion League semi-final that will be played on Saturday was determined last weekend in the last round of pool matches of the competition.

New Dawn Park has secured a home semi-final against Heidelberg United.


> Ramblers has qualified for the semi-final and will take on Mossel Bay at the Van Riebeeck Stadium.


The summarised score cards of the past weekend are:

Heidelberg United beat Thembalethu by 32 runs:

Heidelberg United 231 all out - 44.5 overs (M September 63, Berthal September 33, Duan Roberts 33, Igcobe Khitshini 4/51, Unathi Mbathane 2/44, Kuhle Ncamile 2/49)

Thembalethu 199 all out - 39.2 overs (Thabo Dywili 71, Lastword Tapfumaneyi 34, Joseph Sonti 29, Garth Piererse 3/23, Berthal September 3/54, Wesley Bunding 2/15)

New Dawn Park beat Pirates United by 44 runs:

New Dawn Park 33 all out - 41 overs (Leegan Moos 27, Whaydon Plaatjies 22, Dane Kleinhans 21, Bronwill Goede 4/4 Ruwayne Brinkuis 2/17)

Pirates United 89 all out - 23.2 overs (Brandon Scheepers 6/20, Danvor Muller 3/16)

Ramblers beat Bongolethu by 3 wickets:

Bongolethu 176 all out - 40.6 overs (Stachis Barnard 66, Bradley Wessels 28*, Lorenzo Geodfrey 21, Jared Scheepers 4/61, Lenwill Smart 2/18, Davino Koert 2/33)

Ramblers 182/7 - 35.6 overs (Fabian Campher 53, Hewico Stal 38*, Shanon Nomdoe 21, Lorenzo Godfrey 3/41, Stachis Barnard 2/36)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
